videos.title: CRISTIANO APARECEU NA CERIMÔNIA PELO FILHO DO MESSI😱
videos.transcript: Em 2025, Mateu, o segundo filho de Messi, tentou imitar as embaixadinhas do Cristiano e conseguiu. Com muito entusiasmo, contou logo pro pai, mas Messi não ligou muito. Um ano depois, Mateu foi na cerimônia da bola de ouro do pai. No evento, deram um botão pro Messi e pediram para ele apertar. Quando apertou, a câmera apontou direto pra torre Eel. E vocês vão se surpreender com quem tava lá. Vou mostrar para vocês. Mas antes de continuar, se você é fã de verdade do Ronaldo como eu, aperta o like agora, se inscreve no canal e escreve CR7 nos comentários. Aqui está o que aconteceu. You already know that. But today, it looks like Nicolas found someone. The problem is, maybe his new girlfriend is n't a good person. Hey guys, it 's so hot, perfect day to have some ice cream. That 's why I came here to my favorite ice cream shop. But I have to be really quick, because today I have a recording scheduled with Rinaldinho, man. And for me, ice cream has to be in a cone. Let me choose ... I think I 'll go with vanilla. Ah, now that 's more like it. Wow, this is delicious. Oh man, I ca n't believe you dropped the only ice cream I had. Oh, I 'm so sorry, I was just walking, I did n't even see you. N-no, no, it 's fine here, okay? Look, it 's nothing here. Look, you can ... You can still ... again, this is just too good, you know? Are you sure? I 'll pay you back. Another ice cream. No, but w-wait, you want to buy one for me? Although this ice cream ca n't really be ... I accept. You have n't even told me, have you? What 's your name? Ah, ah, ah, my name is Cascade. Nicolas, Nicolas, that 's my name. I 'm Paty. What was the ice cream you were having again? Well, anyway, go get your very favorite. Oh, it was, it was pineapple, but ... Thank you, really. Ah, but look, you really did n't have to pay for the ice cream, I could 've bought another one. No, I insisted, I was walking, got distracted, and dropped your ice cream. Oh, but you did n't have to. By the way, do you always come here? Not that often. But good thing I came today, right? Good thing, I mean, I ... No, no, it is really true, ice cream. And your girlfriend, does n't she get jealous of you coming ... I do n't know, like, having ice cream alone, no. Oh, so, I do n't have a girlfriend. You do n't have a girlfriend? Wow, that 's strange, you 're so handsome. Yeah, you know how people just do n't have good taste. But what about you? Are you dating anyone? No, I am not, but I actually really wish I was, you know? Me too, seriously. Wow, that 's ... Wow, I 'm just stretching here. Wow, how lucky that I came to get ice cream today, right? Hey Heraldinho, Nico is taking too long for the shoot. He is really late. Yeah, man, he should have arrived already. I 'm going to call him because he 's never this late. Oh my god. telephone. Sorry, okay? Wow, my friend is calling me to record. Hold on a minute, okay? Oh, no You need n't stay. Hello? Nicolas, where are you, man? We 'd scheduled to record, but you 're super late. Ah, Reinaldinho, ca n't we postpone this recording? I 'm on a ... date. What, a date, Nicolas? Work comes first. We 've got to record a video for the audience. Ah, okay, okay, fine. Looks like he 's joking around. Nicolas, asking if there 's any way to reschedule the recording because he was on a date. A date? What do you mean? I did n't get it either. Coming from Nicolas, I doubt it 's anything serious. Look, my friend just called me for a recording, but can we set up to meet later? Give me your phone number. I 'll give it to you, but just call me, okay? Of course, of course I 'll call, I 'll text you, okay? Bye, bye. My phone, goodbye for now. Goodbye, you silly, the connection is starting to drop. No, my plan is fine. Oh, Paty, I barely know you, but ... I think I am starting to fall for you a little bit. Well, Reinaldo, I am right here. So, where exactly have you been, Nicolas? Oh, Reinaldinho, I really think I 'm falling in love. In love? With who? No. It 's none of your business. Anyway, I 'll explain it to him later. We 're already late for the shoot, let 's focus and you two can talk later, okay? One week later ... Guys, guys, guys, I— I do n't know, I need to tell you something, it 's urgent. What is it, Nicolas? I think that ... I 'm going to start dating, I 'm going to start dating— Dating ... Nicolas, I told you I do n't want to date you. Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo
